name: Editorial Magazine
description: Bộ ngôn ngữ thiết kế cho content-driven editorial publishing — fashion blog-shops, niche-curation journals, indie lifestyle magazines, art-print galleries với editorial framing, và modern longform digital cultural editorial. Unified DNA: multi-column body + serif body (reading-grade) + image-led hero sections + content-heavy architecture. Phân biệt với Theme 01 Editorial Luxe (luxury maison launch publication) bằng INDEPENDENT/CONTENT-FIRST positioning — written content + photography là design statement, không phải luxury brand identity.

fashionEditorial._description: DEFAULT personality của Theme 12. Modern fashion-publication ecosystem — independent fashion magazines (Vestoj, 032c, Document Journal), commerce-editorial luxury hybrids (SSENSE editorial, Mr. Porter Journal, MATCHES Style Report), và fashion+youth+culture editorial (Garage, Highsnobiety editorial, Hypebeast features). Image-led với serif editorial body cho season-essays và product-story commerce.

palette._axisDescription: Bộ palette cho Theme 12 Editorial Magazine — moody-editorial (fashion), warm-cream-natural (lifestyle indie), paper-white-literary (niche literary), gallery-white (art prints), serious-mainstream (cultural longform). Mỗi personality có 3-4 palettes phù hợp với content domain và mood.

moodyEditorial._description: Nền near-black charcoal (#0E0E10) + chữ ngà cream và accent oxblood ấm. Default cho fashionEditorial — gợi runway-lighting mood. Canonical: Vestoj, 032c, Document Journal, SSENSE moody features.
moodyEditorial.color.secondaryButton.label: #F2EEE8
moodyEditorial.color.tertiaryButton.label: #cc9999
moodyEditorial.surfaces.dark.color.tertiaryButton.label: #cc9999

warmArchive._description: Nền cream/parchment ấm (#F5EFE4) + chữ sepia đậm và accent oxblood/burgundy. Gợi vintage fashion zine archive (Acne Paper). Cho các thương hiệu fashion với positioning vintage/archive.
warmArchive.color.primaryButton.label: #f8f4ec
warmArchive.surfaces.dark.color.tertiaryButton.label: #f6eeee

coolModernist._description: Nền paper-white (#FAFAF8) + chữ đen sharp và accent electric (blue hoặc red). Modernist fashion publication aesthetic. Gợi gallery-clean editorial — AnOther online, COS Magazine, Document modernist features.
coolModernist.color.primaryButton.label: #f4f4f0
coolModernist.surfaces.dark.color.primaryButton.label: #1e1e15
coolModernist.surfaces.dark.color.tertiaryButton.label: #ffffff

softNeutralLuxe._description: Nền beige soft (#F0EDE6) + chữ warm-grey và accent dusty champagne. Quiet-luxury commerce-editorial mood — softer than moody, warmer than cool. Default cho Mr. Porter Journal, MATCHES Style Report, PorterEdit.
softNeutralLuxe.color.primaryButton.label: #fcf4e9
softNeutralLuxe.surfaces.dark.color.primaryButton.label: #160f03
softNeutralLuxe.surfaces.dark.color.tertiaryButton.label: #ffffff

typeface._axisDescription: Bộ typeface cho editorial publishing — tất cả personalities sử dụng serif body làm signature DNA. Display serif (GT Sectra cho fashion + gallery + mainstream digital-native), literary body serif (Lyon Text, Tiempos Text, Caslon Pro), classical (Didot, Bodoni, Garamond), hybrid sans+serif (Söhne, Neue Haas Grotesk cho navigation/metadata).

fashionDisplaySerif._description: GT Sectra cho headings + Tiempos Text cho body — modern display serif với fashion-magazine convention. Default cho fashionEditorial. Canonical: Vestoj, Document Journal, SSENSE editorial.

neoGroteskHybrid._description: Neue Haas Grotesk cho display + Tiempos Text cho body — modernist sans display kết hợp serif body. Convention art-publication. Canonical: 032c, AnOther Magazine online, Document modernist.

classicalLuxe._description: Bodoni hoặc Didot cho headings + Caslon Pro cho body — classical luxury fashion typography. Cho Mr. Porter classical features, MATCHES Style Report classical issues.

typeWeight._axisDescription: Bộ weight cho editorial — light-considered (slow-living indie + quiet-luxe fashion), regular-body / regular-balanced (default editorial confidence), bold-editorial (zine-loud 032c-style), regular-journalism (semibold-headings cho newspaper-magazine), regular-literary (no display weight — text IS the design).

regularBody._description: Body 400 + headings medium 500-600 — confident editorial balance. Default cho fashionEditorial. Canonical: SSENSE editorial, Document Journal, Vestoj body, Mr. Porter main body.

lightConsidered._description: Body 300 + headings 400 — quiet-luxe restraint. Cho fashionEditorial quiet variants và indieMagazine slow-living. Canonical: Mr. Porter quiet, Cereal, Kinfolk, Holiday, Travel Almanac.

boldEditorial._description: Body 400 + headings 600-700 semibold-bold — zine-loud declarative headlines. Cho fashionEditorial bold. Canonical: 032c, Garage Magazine, Highsnobiety editorial, Hypebeast features.

density._axisDescription: Bộ density cho editorial multi-column body — 3-column literary-dense (curatorialJournal), 2-column spacious (indieMagazine), 3-4 column lookbook-grid (fashionEditorial commerce), gallery-spacious image-dominant (artPrintGallery), 2-column với sidebar (culturalDigest).

lookbookGrid._description: 3-4 column grid (~96-112px section padding) cho article + product cards. Default cho fashionEditorial commerce-editorial hybrid. Canonical: SSENSE, Mr. Porter Journal, MATCHES, PorterEdit.

magazineSpread._description: 2-column body với full-bleed image spreads (~144-176px padding) — gallery-spacious cho pure editorial / long-form features. Cho fashionEditorial features và indieMagazine image-led storytelling.

denseEditorialFeed._description: 4-5 column archive feed (~64-80px padding) — content browsing density. Cho fashionEditorial archive browsing. Canonical: SSENSE editorial archive, Highsnobiety feed, Hypebeast features feed.

silhouette._axisDescription: Bộ silhouette cho editorial publishing — sharp 0px (default + locked-only cho curatorialJournal/artPrintGallery), minimalSoft 4px cho commerce-editorial hybrids (Mr. Porter, Toast UK product cards) và digital-native cultural (Aeon, Vox).

sharp._description: Border radius 0px — editorial publishing convention, magazine/gallery/literary discipline. Default cho tất cả 5 personalities. Locked-only option cho curatorialJournal và artPrintGallery (academic/museum character signature).

minimalSoft._description: Border radius 4px — softer commerce-editorial mood. Cho Mr. Porter product cards, Toast UK product cards, Aeon/Vox softer digital-native cultural. Không phải cho curatorialJournal/artPrintGallery (locked sharp).

indieMagazine._description: LIFESTYLE-IMAGE-LED counterpart trong Theme 12. Independent lifestyle/travel/architecture/food magazines và blog-shop hybrids — Cereal, Kinfolk current, Toast Magazine UK, Holiday, Travel Almanac, Real Review, NICE, Cherry Bombe. Warm cream + light considered weight + 2-column spacious body + full-bleed warm-toned lifestyle photography.

palette._axisDescription: Bộ palette cho Theme 12 Editorial Magazine — moody-editorial (fashion), warm-cream-natural (lifestyle indie), paper-white-literary (niche literary), gallery-white (art prints), serious-mainstream (cultural longform). Mỗi personality có 3-4 palettes phù hợp với content domain và mood.

warmCreamNatural._description: Nền cream/parchment ấm (#F5F0E6) + chữ warm-dark và accent earth (terracotta/olive/tan). Signature indie-lifestyle palette. Default cho Cereal, Kinfolk, Toast UK, Holiday, NICE Magazine.

typeface._axisDescription: Bộ typeface cho editorial publishing — tất cả personalities sử dụng serif body làm signature DNA. Display serif (GT Sectra cho fashion + gallery + mainstream digital-native), literary body serif (Lyon Text, Tiempos Text, Caslon Pro), classical (Didot, Bodoni, Garamond), hybrid sans+serif (Söhne, Neue Haas Grotesk cho navigation/metadata).

literaryWarmSerif._description: Lyon Display cho headings + Lyon Text cho body — signature indie-magazine literary-warm pairing. Default cho Cereal, Kinfolk, Toast, Holiday, NICE Magazine.

warmHumanistSerif._description: GT Alpina Italic cho headings + GT Alpina cho body — contemporary-humanist serif character. Slightly more modern than literaryWarm. Cho Toast UK contemporary, Holiday modern issues.

classicalEditorialSerif._description: GT Super Display cho headings + Caslon Pro cho body — classical editorial mood. Cho Apartamento modern classical, Real Review classical features, architecture quarterlies.

typeWeight._axisDescription: Bộ weight cho editorial — light-considered (slow-living indie + quiet-luxe fashion), regular-body / regular-balanced (default editorial confidence), bold-editorial (zine-loud 032c-style), regular-journalism (semibold-headings cho newspaper-magazine), regular-literary (no display weight — text IS the design).

lightConsidered._description: Body 300 + headings 400 — quiet-luxe restraint. Cho fashionEditorial quiet variants và indieMagazine slow-living. Canonical: Mr. Porter quiet, Cereal, Kinfolk, Holiday, Travel Almanac.

regularBalanced._description: Body 400 + headings 500 — confident indie magazine balance. Cho indieMagazine contemporary face, artPrintGallery monograph publishers, culturalDigest digital-native modern. Canonical: Toast UK, Apartamento modern, Real Review, Aeon, LitHub.

density._axisDescription: Bộ density cho editorial multi-column body — 3-column literary-dense (curatorialJournal), 2-column spacious (indieMagazine), 3-4 column lookbook-grid (fashionEditorial commerce), gallery-spacious image-dominant (artPrintGallery), 2-column với sidebar (culturalDigest).

spaciousTwoColumn._description: 2-column body (~144-160px padding) — gallery-spacious slow-reading mood. Default cho indieMagazine. Canonical: Cereal, Kinfolk, Holiday, Travel Almanac, NICE, Stranger's Guide.

magazineSpread._description: 2-column body với full-bleed image spreads (~144-176px padding) — gallery-spacious cho pure editorial / long-form features. Cho fashionEditorial features và indieMagazine image-led storytelling.

compactStoryFeed._description: 3-column feed cho article + product cards (~96-112px padding) — browse-friendly density cho commerce-attached lifestyle blog-shops. Cho Toast UK Magazine + Curated Objects layout.

silhouette._axisDescription: Bộ silhouette cho editorial publishing — sharp 0px (default + locked-only cho curatorialJournal/artPrintGallery), minimalSoft 4px cho commerce-editorial hybrids (Mr. Porter, Toast UK product cards) và digital-native cultural (Aeon, Vox).

sharp._description: Border radius 0px — editorial publishing convention, magazine/gallery/literary discipline. Default cho tất cả 5 personalities. Locked-only option cho curatorialJournal và artPrintGallery (academic/museum character signature).

minimalSoft._description: Border radius 4px — softer commerce-editorial mood. Cho Mr. Porter product cards, Toast UK product cards, Aeon/Vox softer digital-native cultural. Không phải cho curatorialJournal/artPrintGallery (locked sharp).

curatorialJournal._description: TEXT-DOMINANT LITERARY personality. Niche literary/cultural/critical quarterlies — n+1, The Believer, Cabinet, Lapham's Quarterly, The Drift, The Baffler, Paris Review online, Real Life Magazine, Triple Canopy. Paper-white hoặc warm-cream + classical body serif (Caslon/Sabon/Tiempos Text) + DENSE 3-column body + sparse imagery + sharp 0px corners + KHÔNG có display drama (text IS the design).

palette._axisDescription: Bộ palette cho Theme 12 Editorial Magazine — moody-editorial (fashion), warm-cream-natural (lifestyle indie), paper-white-literary (niche literary), gallery-white (art prints), serious-mainstream (cultural longform). Mỗi personality có 3-4 palettes phù hợp với content domain và mood.

paperWhiteLiterary._description: Nền paper-white (#FBFBF9) + chữ deep-ink và accent maroon restrained. Default cho literary journal — text-first restraint. Canonical: n+1, The Believer, Cabinet, LARB, Bookforum.

typeface._axisDescription: Bộ typeface cho editorial publishing — tất cả personalities sử dụng serif body làm signature DNA. Display serif (GT Sectra cho fashion + gallery + mainstream digital-native), literary body serif (Lyon Text, Tiempos Text, Caslon Pro), classical (Didot, Bodoni, Garamond), hybrid sans+serif (Söhne, Neue Haas Grotesk cho navigation/metadata).

classicalLiterarySerif._description: Caslon Pro xuyên suốt headings và body — literary-journal convention, text IS the design. Default cho n+1, The Believer, Cabinet, Lapham's Quarterly, The Drift, The Baffler, The Point.

modernistLiteraryHybrid._description: Tiempos Text body kết hợp Söhne cho eyebrow/labels — online experimental literary pairing. Cho Triple Canopy, Real Life Magazine, modern Cabinet online.

academicSerif._description: Minion Pro hoặc Adobe Garamond Pro xuyên suốt — academic-tier literary typography. Cho The Yale Review, Public Books, indie academic literary journals.

typeWeight._axisDescription: Bộ weight cho editorial — light-considered (slow-living indie + quiet-luxe fashion), regular-body / regular-balanced (default editorial confidence), bold-editorial (zine-loud 032c-style), regular-journalism (semibold-headings cho newspaper-magazine), regular-literary (no display weight — text IS the design).

regularLiterary._description: Body 400 + headings 400 — text IS the design. Default cho curatorialJournal. Canonical: n+1, The Believer, Cabinet, Lapham's Quarterly, The Drift, The Baffler.

lightRestrained._description: Body 300 + headings 400 — quietest literary weight. Cho restrained philosophy / experimental literary. Canonical: The Point, Triple Canopy, Public Books surfaces.

density._axisDescription: Bộ density cho editorial multi-column body — 3-column literary-dense (curatorialJournal), 2-column spacious (indieMagazine), 3-4 column lookbook-grid (fashionEditorial commerce), gallery-spacious image-dominant (artPrintGallery), 2-column với sidebar (culturalDigest).

denseThreeColumn._description: 3-column body (~96-112px padding) — literary-journal convention, print-quarterly feel. Default cho curatorialJournal. Canonical: n+1, The Believer, Cabinet, Lapham's Quarterly, The Drift, Public Books.

twoColumnRead._description: 2-column body (~112-128px padding) — longer-form reading mode. Cho online-experimental literary. Canonical: Triple Canopy, Real Life Magazine, Public Books online, The Point online.

silhouette._axisDescription: Bộ silhouette cho editorial publishing — sharp 0px (default + locked-only cho curatorialJournal/artPrintGallery), minimalSoft 4px cho commerce-editorial hybrids (Mr. Porter, Toast UK product cards) và digital-native cultural (Aeon, Vox).

sharp._description: Border radius 0px — editorial publishing convention, magazine/gallery/literary discipline. Default cho tất cả 5 personalities. Locked-only option cho curatorialJournal và artPrintGallery (academic/museum character signature).

artPrintGallery._description: IMAGE-DOMINANT GALLERY personality — inverse của curatorialJournal. Art-print stores, online galleries, monograph publishers, photography-book publishers — Avant Arte, Tappan Collective, 20x200, Lumas, Phaidon online, MACK Books, David Zwirner Books, Aperture, Counter-Print. Gallery-white hoặc warm-paper-monograph + modernist-museum serif + light weight + large image plates + minimal museum-label text + sharp 0px.

palette._axisDescription: Bộ palette cho Theme 12 Editorial Magazine — moody-editorial (fashion), warm-cream-natural (lifestyle indie), paper-white-literary (niche literary), gallery-white (art prints), serious-mainstream (cultural longform). Mỗi personality có 3-4 palettes phù hợp với content domain và mood.

galleryWhite._description: Nền pure white (#FFFFFF) + chữ đen sharp và accent minimal grey. Museum white-cube convention — artwork imagery dominates. Default cho Avant Arte, Tappan Collective, 20x200, Lumas, Aurogon.

modernistMuseumSerif._description: GT Sectra cho headings + Tiempos Text body modest — gallery-museum-label typography signature. Default cho Avant Arte, Tappan Collective, 20x200, Hauser & Wirth Publishers, Counter-Print.

swissModernist._description: Neue Haas Grotesk xuyên suốt — Swiss-modernist sans purism. Cho Lumas photographic editions, Swiss design book publishers, modernist Hauser & Wirth surfaces.

literaryMonograph._description: GT Sectra Display cho headings + Tiempos Text body cho long-form artist essays. Cho Phaidon online, MACK Books, David Zwirner Books, Aperture (longer body text).

typeWeight._axisDescription: Bộ weight cho editorial — light-considered (slow-living indie + quiet-luxe fashion), regular-body / regular-balanced (default editorial confidence), bold-editorial (zine-loud 032c-style), regular-journalism (semibold-headings cho newspaper-magazine), regular-literary (no display weight — text IS the design).

lightGalleryRestraint._description: Body 300 + headings 400 — gallery-restraint signature. Default cho artPrintGallery. Canonical: Avant Arte, Tappan, 20x200, Lumas, Hauser & Wirth Publishers.

regularBalanced._description: Body 400 + headings 500 — confident indie magazine balance. Cho indieMagazine contemporary face, artPrintGallery monograph publishers, culturalDigest digital-native modern. Canonical: Toast UK, Apartamento modern, Real Review, Aeon, LitHub.

density._axisDescription: Bộ density cho editorial multi-column body — 3-column literary-dense (curatorialJournal), 2-column spacious (indieMagazine), 3-4 column lookbook-grid (fashionEditorial commerce), gallery-spacious image-dominant (artPrintGallery), 2-column với sidebar (culturalDigest).

gallerySpacious._description: Single hoặc 2-column image-dominant layout (~144-200px padding) — huge whitespace around images. Default cho artPrintGallery. Canonical: Avant Arte, Tappan Collective, 20x200, Lumas, Aurogon.

monographGrid._description: 2-3 column grid cho book/print catalog browsing (~96-112px padding). Cho monograph publishers với substantial catalogs. Canonical: Phaidon online catalog, MACK Books, David Zwirner Books, Aperture.

silhouette._axisDescription: Bộ silhouette cho editorial publishing — sharp 0px (default + locked-only cho curatorialJournal/artPrintGallery), minimalSoft 4px cho commerce-editorial hybrids (Mr. Porter, Toast UK product cards) và digital-native cultural (Aeon, Vox).

sharp._description: Border radius 0px — editorial publishing convention, magazine/gallery/literary discipline. Default cho tất cả 5 personalities. Locked-only option cho curatorialJournal và artPrintGallery (academic/museum character signature).

culturalDigest._description: MAINSTREAM SERIOUS LONGFORM personality. Modern digital cultural longform magazines — legacy mastheads với modern digital incarnations (The Atlantic web, NYer web, Harper's web, NYT Magazine, Granta online), mainstream philosophy/ideas (Aeon, The Conversation, Quanta), mainstream criticism (Pitchfork longform, Vox Highlight, ProPublica), mainstream architecture media (Dezeen, ArchDaily). Paper-white-or-dark reading palette + mainstream-magazine serif + 2-column body + sidebar metadata + newspaper-magazine navy/red accent.

palette._axisDescription: Bộ palette cho Theme 12 Editorial Magazine — moody-editorial (fashion), warm-cream-natural (lifestyle indie), paper-white-literary (niche literary), gallery-white (art prints), serious-mainstream (cultural longform).
